details: CPU utilization exceeded 85% for 10 minutes during morning batch processing.
Memory usage reached 92% on production database server. Query cache eviction rate increased.
Inventory sync job failed after 3 retries. Automatic restart triggered. Root cause: stale snapshot lock.
Disk usage at 78% on compliance document repository. Projected to reach 85% in 14 days.
Error rate increased to 4.2% on customer-facing API. Majority are 503 responses from downstream inventory service.
Customer API error rate returned to baseline 0.1% after inventory service stabilized.
Nightly backup completed successfully. Backup size: 247 GB. Duration: 42 minutes.
VPN gateway TLS certificate expires in 21 days. Previous outage caused by late renewal.
